subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! Thy recent letter was received... From every quarter hast thou loosed the arrows of prayer, that haply one among them might find its mark [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه اخیر شما رسید ... از هر کنار تیر دعا کرده‌ئی روان شاید کزین میانه یکی کارگر شود
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
